title: Mario Paint Composer - Alien Carnage PDA Theme
description:
FUCK YES YOU ARE THE BEST TUNE EVER!!

Did this all by ear. No cheating. No exporting raw files and listening to them one instrument at a time. No MIDI charts. Nothing. I spent more time fine-tuning those goddamn piranha plants than you would BELIEVE.

I think I'm gonna take a break now. It's 5 AM.
